    wait()
until game:IsLoaded()

    wait()
until game.ReplicatedStorage

    wait()
until game.Players

    wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer

    wait()
until game.Players.LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild('PlayerGui')

    wait()
until game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts

    wait()
until game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework

    wait()
until game.ReplicatedStorage.Util.CameraShaker

if not game:IsLoaded() then
    local _Message = Instance.new('Message', workspace)

    _Message.Text = 'Wait Game Loading'

    game.Loaded:Wait()
    _Message:Destroy()
    task.wait(10)
end
if not game:IsLoaded() then
    repeat
        game.Loaded:Wait()
    until game:IsLoaded()
end

function KeySystem()
    local _ThunderScreen = game.CoreGui:FindFirstChild('ThunderScreen')

    if _ThunderScreen then
        _ThunderScreen:Destroy()
    end

    function MakeDraggable(p8)
        local u9 = nil
        local u10 = nil
        local u11 = nil
        local u12 = nil

        local function u15(p13)
            local v14 = p13.Position - u12

            p8.Position = UDim2.new(u9.X.Scale, u9.X.Offset + v14.X, u9.Y.Scale, u9.Y.Offset + v14.Y)
        end

        p8.InputBegan:Connect(function(p16)
            if p16.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 or p16.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
                u10 = true
                u12 = p16.Position
                u9 = p8.Position

                p16.Changed:Connect(function()
                    if p16.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                        u10 = false
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        p8.InputChanged:Connect(function(p17)
            if p17.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement or p17.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
                u11 = p17
            end
        end)
        _UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(p18)
            if p18 == u11 and u10 then
                u15(p18)
            end
        end)
    end

    local u19 = {}

    local function u40()
        local _t = os.date('*t')
        local v33 = _t.hour % 24
        local v34 = v33 < 12 and 'AM' or 'PM'
        local __02i02i02is = string.format('%02i:%02i:%02i %s', (v33 - 1) % 12 + 1, _t.min, _t.sec, v34)
        local __02d02d04d = string.format('%02d/%02d/%04d', _t.day, _t.month, _t.year)
        local _LocalizationService = game:GetService('LocalizationService')
        local _LocalPlayer = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer
        local _ = _LocalPlayer.Name
        local _, v39 = pcall(function()
            return _LocalizationService:GetCountryRegionForPlayerAsync(_LocalPlayer)
        end)

        u19:Set(__02d02d04d .. ' - ' .. __02i02i02is .. ' [ ' .. v39 .. ' ]')
    end

    coroutine.resume(coroutine.create(function()
        while true do
            u40()
            game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Wait()
        end
    end))

    end)

spawn(function()
    pcall(function()
        if not (syn and syn.queue_on_teleport) and (not queue_on_teleport and fluxus) then
            local _ = fluxus.queue_on_teleport
        end

        local _THUNDERZKeytxt = isfile('THUNDERZKey.txt')

        if _THUNDERZKeytxt and _THUNDERZKeytxt ~= nil then
            print('attempting to load key...')

            if u6:ValidateKey(u5, (readfile('THUNDERZKey.txt'))) then
                LoadScript()
                u4({
                    Title = 'Key System',
                    Content = 'Found Existing Key ! , Load Script',
                    Delay = 2,
                })
            else
                u4({
                    Title = 'Key System',
                    Content = 'Expired Key.',
                    Delay = 3,
                })
                KeySystem()
            end
        else
            KeySystem()
        end
    end)
end)

function LoadSettings()
    if readfile and (writefile and (isfile and isfolder)) then
        if not isfolder('ThunderZ Hub') then
            makefolder('ThunderZ Hub')
        end
        if not isfolder('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits') then
            makefolder('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits')
        end
        if isfile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json') then
            local v67 = game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONDecode(readfile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json'))
            local v68, v69, v70 = pairs(v67)

            while true do
                local v71

                v70, v71 = v68(v69, v70)

                if v70 == nil then
                    break
                end

                _G.Settings[v70] = v71
            end
        else
            writefile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json', game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONEncode(_G.Settings))
        end
    else
        local _ = warn
    end
end
function SaveSettings()
    if readfile and (writefile and (isfile and isfolder)) then
        if isfile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json') then
            game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONDecode(readfile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json'))

            local v72, v73, v74 = pairs(_G.Settings)
            local v75 = {}

            while true do
                local v76

                v74, v76 = v72(v73, v74)

                if v74 == nil then
                    break
                end

                v75[v74] = v76
            end

            writefile('ThunderZ Hub/Blox Fruits/' .. game.Players.LocalPlayer.Name .. '.json', game:GetService('HttpService'):JSONEncode(v75))
        else
            LoadSettings()
        end
    else
        local _ = warn
    end
end

        function ShipTP(p113)
            local _TweenService2 = game:service('TweenService')
            local v115 = TweenInfo.new((game:GetService('Workspace').Boats:FindFirstChild(_G.Settings.Main['Select Boats']).VehicleSeat.CFrame.Position - p113.Position).Magnitude / 300, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)

            tween:Play()

            return {
                Stop = function(_)
                    tween:Cancel()
                end,
            }
        end
        function InMyNetWork(p116)

        function CurrentWeapon()
            local u123 = u122.activeController.blades[1]

            if not u123 then
                return game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Tool').Name
            end

            pcall(function()
                while u123.Parent ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character do
                    u123 = u123.Parent
                end
            end)

            return u123 or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Tool').Name
        end
        function getAllBladeHits(p124)
            local _LocalPlayer2 = game.Players.LocalPlayer
            local v126 = game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren()
            local v127 = {}

            for v128 = 1, #v126 do
                local _Humanoid = v126[v128]:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid')

                if _Humanoid then
                    if _Humanoid.RootPart then
                        if _Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                            if _LocalPlayer2:DistanceFromCharacter(_Humanoid.RootPart.Position) < p124 + 5 then
                                table.insert(v127, _Humanoid.RootPart)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            return v127
        end
        function AttackFunction()
            local _activeController = u122.activeController

            if _activeController and _activeController.equipped then
                for _ = 1, 1 do
                    local v131 = getAllBladeHits(60)

                    if #v131 > 0 then
                        local u132 = debug.getupvalue(_activeController.attack, 5)
                        local u133 = debug.getupvalue(_activeController.attack, 6)
                        local u134 = debug.getupvalue(_activeController.attack, 4)
                        local v135 = debug.getupvalue(_activeController.attack, 7)
                        local u136 = (u132 * 798405 + u134 * 727595) % u133
                        local u137 = u134 * 798405

                        (function()
                            u136 = (u136 * u133 + u137) % 1099511627776
                            u132 = math.floor(u136 / u133)
                            u134 = u136 - u132 * u133
                        end)()

                        local v138 = v135 + 1

                        debug.setupvalue(_activeController.attack, 5, u132)
                        debug.setupvalue(_activeController.attack, 6, u133)
                        debug.setupvalue(_activeController.attack, 4, u134)
                        debug.setupvalue(_activeController.attack, 7, v138)

                        local v139, v140, v141 = pairs(_activeController.animator.anims.basic)
                        local v142 = u136

                        while true do
                            local v143

                            v141, v143 = v139(v140, v141)

                            if v141 == nil then
                                break
                            end

                            v143:Play(0.1, 0.5, 0.2, 0.8)
                        end

                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Tool') and (_activeController.blades and _activeController.blades[1]) then
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').RigControllerEvent:FireServer('weaponChange', tostring(CurrentWeapon()))
                            game.ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.Validator:FireServer(math.floor(v142 / 1099511627776 * 16777215), v138)
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').RigControllerEvent:FireServer('hit', v131, 2, '')
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        spawn(function()
            while wait(0.4) do
                local _activeController2 = u122.activeController

                if _activeController2 and (_activeController2.equipped and FastAttack) then
                    pcall(function()
                        if FastAttack and (_G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] and not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Fruit Mastery']) then
                            repeat
                                wait(_G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack Delay'])
                                AttackFunction()
                            until FastAttack == false or not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack']
                        elseif (FastAttack == false or not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack']) and _activeController2.hitboxMagnitude ~= 55 then
                            _activeController2.hitboxMagnitude = 55
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end
        end)

        end)

        function Com(p146, ...)
            local v147 = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes:FindFirstChild('Comm' .. p146)

            if v147:IsA('RemoteEvent') then
                v147:FireServer(...)
            elseif v147:IsA('RemoteFunction') then
                v147:InvokeServer(...)
            end
        end

        local function u158(...)
            local v148 = {...}
            local v149 = v148[1]
            local v150 = nil

            if type(v149) ~= 'vector' then
                if type(v149) ~= 'userdata' then
                    if type(v149) == 'number' then
                        v150 = CFrame.new(unpack(v148)).p
                    end
                else
                    v150 = v149.Position
                end
            else
                v150 = v149
            end

            local v151 = nil
            local _huge = math.huge

            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Team then
                local v153, v154, v155 = pairs(game.Workspace._WorldOrigin.PlayerSpawns:FindFirstChild(tostring(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Team)):GetChildren())

                while true do
                    local v156

                    v155, v156 = v153(v154, v155)

                    if v155 == nil then
                        break
                    end

                    local _Magnitude = (v150 - v156:GetModelCFrame().p).Magnitude

                    if _Magnitude < _huge then
                        v151 = v156.Name
                        _huge = _Magnitude
                    end
                end

                if v151 then
                    return v151
                end
            end
        end
        local function u167(...)
            local v159 = {...}
            local v160 = v159[1]
            local u161 = nil

            if type(v160) ~= 'vector' then
                if type(v160) ~= 'userdata' then
                    if type(v160) == 'number' then
                        u161 = CFrame.new(unpack(v159))
                    end
                else
                    u161 = v160
                end
            else
                u161 = CFrame.new(v160)
            end
            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health == 0 then
                if tween then
                    tween:Cancel()
                end

                repeat
                    wait()
                until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0

                wait(0.2)
            end

            local v162 = {}
            local _Magnitude2 = (u161.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).Magnitude

            if _Magnitude2 < 1000 then
                Speed = 315
            elseif _Magnitude2 >= 1000 then
                Speed = 200
            end
            if _G.Settings.Config['Bypass TP'] and (3000 < _Magnitude2 and (_G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Farm Dungeon'] and not (_G.Settings.Material.Enable or (_G.AutoGodhuman or _G.AutoRaid)))) and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Special Microchip') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Special Microchip') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Hallow Essence') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Hallow Essence') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Sweet Chalice') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Sweet Chalice') and (NameMon ~= 'Fishman Commando' and NameMon ~= 'Fishman Warrior'))))))))) then
                pcall(function()
                    tween:Cancel()

                    fkwarp = false

                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Data:FindFirstChild('SpawnPoint').Value == tostring(u158(u161)) then
                        wait(0.1)
                        Com('F_', 'TeleportToSpawn')
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Data:FindFirstChild('LastSpawnPoint').Value == tostring(u158(u161)) then
                        game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid'):ChangeState(15)
                        wait(0.1)
                        wait()

                        if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0 then
                        end
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0 then
                        if fkwarp == false then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = u161
                        end

                        fkwarp = true
                    end

                    wait(0.08)
                    game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid'):ChangeState(15)

                    repeat
                        wait()
                    until game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0

                    wait(0.1)
                    Com('F_', 'SetSpawnPoint')
                    wait(0.2)
                end)
            end

            local _TweenService3 = game:service('TweenService')
            local u165 = TweenInfo.new((u161.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).Magnitude / Speed, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)
            local _, _ = pcall(function()
                local v166 = {CFrame = u161}

                tween = _TweenService3:Create(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, u165, v166)

                tween:Play()
            end)

            function v162.Stop(_)
                tween:Cancel()
            end
            function v162.Wait(_)
                tween.Completed:Wait()
            end

            return v162
        end

        function toTargetP(...)
            local v168 = {...}
            local v169 = v168[1]
            local u170 = nil

            if type(v169) ~= 'vector' then
                if type(v169) ~= 'userdata' then
                    if type(v169) == 'number' then
                        u170 = CFrame.new(unpack(v168))
                    end
                else
                    u170 = v169
                end
            else
                u170 = CFrame.new(v169)
            end
            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health == 0 then
                if tween then
                    tween:Cancel()
                end

                repeat
                    wait()
                until game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0

                wait(0.2)
            end

            local v171 = {}
            local _Magnitude3 = (u170.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).Magnitude

            if _Magnitude3 < 1000 then
                Speed = 315
            elseif _Magnitude3 >= 1000 then
                Speed = 300
            end

            local _TweenService4 = game:service('TweenService')
            local u174 = TweenInfo.new((u170.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).Magnitude / Speed, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)
            local _, _ = pcall(function()
                local v175 = {CFrame = u170}

                tween = _TweenService4:Create(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, u174, v175)

                tween:Play()
            end)

            function v171.Stop(_)
                tween:Cancel()
            end
            function v171.Wait(_)
                tween.Completed:Wait()
            end

            return v171
        end
        function TP(p176)
            Distance = (p176.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude

            if Distance >= 10 then
                if Distance >= 170 then
                    if Distance >= 1000 then
                        if Distance >= 1000 then
                            Speed = 250
                        end
                    else
                        Speed = 350
                    end
                else
                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = p176
                    Speed = 350
                end
            else
                Speed = 1000
            end

            game:GetService('TweenService'):Create(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, TweenInfo.new(Distance / Speed, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), {CFrame = p176}):Play()
        end
        function InfinitiesEnergy()
            game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Energy.Changed:connect(function()
                if _G.InfinityEnergy then
                    game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Energy.Value = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Energy.MaxValue
                end
            end)
        end
        function getRoot(p177)
            return p177:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') or (p177:FindFirstChild('Torso') or p177:FindFirstChild('UpperTorso'))
        end
        function r15(p178)
            if p178.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid').RigType == Enum.HumanoidRigType.R15 then
                return true
            end
        end
        function ClickCamera()
            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):ClickButton1(Vector2.new(851, 158), game:GetService('Workspace').Camera.CFrame)
        end
        function Click()
            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
        end

        repeat
            wait()
        until game.CoreGui:FindFirstChild('RobloxPromptGui')

        local _ = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer
        local _promptOverlay = game.CoreGui.RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay
        local _TeleportService = game:GetService('TeleportService')

        _promptOverlay.ChildAdded:connect(function(p181)
            if _G.Settings.Config.Rejoin and p181.Name == 'ErrorPrompt' then
                wait(2)

                repeat
                    wait(2)
                    _TeleportService:Teleport(game.PlaceId)
                    wait(2)
                until false
            end
        end)

        local u182 = {}

        function Hop()
            local function v189()
                for v183 = 1, 100 do
                    local v184 = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').__ServerBrowser:InvokeServer(v183)
                    local v185, v186, v187 = pairs(v184)

                    while true do
                        local v188

                        v187, v188 = v185(v186, v187)

                        if v187 == nil then
                            break
                        end
                        if v187 ~= game.JobId and v188.Count < 10 then
                            if not u182[v187] or tick() - u182[v187].Time > 600 then
                                u182[v187] = {
                                    Time = tick(),
                                }

                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').__ServerBrowser:InvokeServer('teleport', v187)

                                return true
                            end
                            if tick() - u182[v187].Time > 3600 then
                                u182[v187] = nil
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end

                return false
            end

            if not getgenv().Loaded then
                local v190, v191, v192 = pairs(game.CoreGui.RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay:GetChildren())

                local function v194(p193)
                    while true do
                        wait()

                        if p193.Name == 'ErrorPrompt' then
                            if p193.Visible and p193.TitleFrame.ErrorTitle.Text == 'Teleport failed' then
                                Hop()
                            end

                            p193:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Visible'):Connect(function()
                                if p193.Visible and p193.TitleFrame.ErrorTitle.Text == 'Teleport failed' then
                                    Hop()
                                end
                            end)
                        end
                        if Hop() then
                            return
                        end
                    end
                end

                while true do
                    local v195

                    v192, v195 = v190(v191, v192)

                    if v192 == nil then
                        break
                    end

                    v194(v195)
                end

                game.CoreGui.RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay.ChildAdded:Connect(v194)

                getgenv().Loaded = true
            end

            while not v189() do
                wait()
            end
        end

            v196.__namecall = newcclosure(function(...)
                local v198 = {...}

                if getnamecallmethod() == 'InvokeServer' and (SelectWeaponGun and (SelectWeaponGun == 'Soul Guitar' and (tostring(v198[2]) == 'TAP' and (_G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Gun Mastery'] and StartMasteryGunMagnet)))) then

                end

                return ___namecall(unpack(v198))
            end)

            setreadonly(v196, true)
        end)

        function RemoveFruit(p203)
            return p203:gsub(' Fruit', '')
        end
        function comma_value(p204)
            repeat
                local v205

                p204, v205 = string.gsub(p204, '^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)', '%1,%2')
            until v205 == 0

            return p204
        end

        _G.CheckFruitLocal1M = false

        function CheckFruit1M()
            local v206, v207, v208 = pairs(game.ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild('Remotes').CommF_:InvokeServer('getInventoryFruits'))

            while true do
                local v209

                v208, v209 = v206(v207, v208)

                if v208 == nil then
                    break
                end
                if v209.Price >= 1000000 then
                    _G.CheckFruitLocal1M = true
                end
            end
        end
        function GetFightingStyle(p210)
            ReturnText = ''

            local v211, v212, v213 = pairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren())

            while true do
                local v214

                v213, v214 = v211(v212, v213)

                if v213 == nil then
                    break
                end
                if v214:IsA('Tool') and v214.ToolTip == p210 then
                    ReturnText = v214.Name
                end
            end

            local v215, v216, v217 = pairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:GetChildren())

            while true do
                local v218

                v217, v218 = v215(v216, v217)

                if v217 == nil then
                    break
                end
                if v218:IsA('Tool') and v218.ToolTip == p210 then
                    ReturnText = v218.Name
                end
            end

            return ReturnText == '' and 'Not Have' or ReturnText
        end
        function CheckMasteryWeapon(p219, p220)
            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(p219) then
                if tonumber(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(p219).Level.Value) < tonumber(p220) then
                    return 'true DownTo'
                end
                if tonumber(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(p219).Level.Value) >= tonumber(p220) then
                    return 'true UpTo'
                end
            end
            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(p219) then
                if tonumber(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(p219).Level.Value) < tonumber(p220) then
                    return 'true DownTo'
                end
                if tonumber(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(p219).Level.Value) >= tonumber(p220) then
                    return 'true UpTo'
                end
            end

            return 'else'
        end
        function GetWeaponInventory(p221)
            local v222, v223, v224 = pairs(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('getInventory'))

            while true do
                local v225

                v224, v225 = v222(v223, v224)

                if v224 == nil then
                    break
                end
                if type(v225) == 'table' and (v225.Type == 'Sword' and v225.Name == p221) then
                    return true
                end
            end

            return false
        end

        function CheckQuestBoss()
            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Saber Expert' then
                if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'The Saw' then
                    if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Greybeard' then
                        if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Mob Leader' then
                            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'The Gorilla King' then
                                if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Bobby [Lv. 55]' then
                                    if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Yeti [Lv. 110]' then
                                        if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Vice Admiral' then
                                            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Warden' then
                                                if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Chief Warden' then
                                                    if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Swan' then
                                                        if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Magma Admiral' then
                                                            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Fishman Lord' then
                                                                if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Wysper' then
                                                                    if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Thunder God' then
                                                                        if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Cyborg' then
                                                                            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Don Swan' then
                                                                                if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Diamond' then

                                                                                        if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Fajita' then
                                                                                            if _G.SelectBoss ~= 'Smoke Admiral' then

        CheckQuestBoss()

        AttackRandomType = 1

        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                AttackRandomType = math.random(1, 5)

                wait(0.3)
            end
        end)

        function isnil(p264)
            return p264 == nil
        end

        local function u266(p265)
            return math.floor(tonumber(p265) + 0.5)
        end

        Number = math.random(1, 1000000)

        function UpdateEspPlayer()
            local v267, v268, v269 = pairs(game:GetService('Players'):GetChildren())

            while true do
                local u270

                v269, u270 = v267(v268, v269)

                if v269 == nil then
                    break
                end

                pcall(function()
                    if not isnil(u270.Character) then
                        if ESPPlayer then
                            if isnil(u270.Character.Head) or u270.Character.Head:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number) then
                                u270.Character.Head['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.Text = u270.Name .. ' | ' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u270.Character.Head.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M\nHealth : ' .. u266(u270.Character.Humanoid.Health * 100 / u270.Character.Humanoid.MaxHealth) .. '%'
                            else
                                local _BillboardGui = Instance.new('BillboardGui', u270.Character.Head)

                                _BillboardGui.Name = 'NameEsp' .. Number
                                _BillboardGui.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                _BillboardGui.Size = UDim2.new(1, 200, 1, 30)
                                _BillboardGui.Adornee = u270.Character.Head
                                _BillboardGui.AlwaysOnTop = true

                                local _TextLabel4 = Instance.new('TextLabel', _BillboardGui)

                                _TextLabel4.Font = Enum.Font.Code
                                _TextLabel4.FontSize = 'Size14'
                                _TextLabel4.TextWrapped = true
                                _TextLabel4.Text = u270.Name .. ' \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u270.Character.Head.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                                _TextLabel4.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                                _TextLabel4.TextYAlignment = 'Top'
                                _TextLabel4.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                _TextLabel4.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
                                _TextLabel4.TextColor3 = Color3.new(255, 255, 255)
                            end
                        elseif u270.Character.Head:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number) then
                            u270.Character.Head:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number):Destroy()
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
        function UpdateIslandESP()
            local v273, v274, v275 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:GetChildren())

            while true do
                local u276

                v275, u276 = v273(v274, v275)

                if v275 == nil then
                    break
                end

                pcall(function()
                    if IslandESP then
                        if u276.Name ~= 'Sea' then
                            if u276:FindFirstChild('NameEsp') then
                                u276.NameEsp.TextLabel.Text = u276.Name .. '   \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u276.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                            else
                                local _BillboardGui2 = Instance.new('BillboardGui', u276)

                                _BillboardGui2.Name = 'NameEsp'
                                _BillboardGui2.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                _BillboardGui2.Size = UDim2.new(1, 200, 1, 30)
                                _BillboardGui2.Adornee = u276
                                _BillboardGui2.AlwaysOnTop = true

                                local _TextLabel5 = Instance.new('TextLabel', _BillboardGui2)

                                _TextLabel5.Font = Enum.Font.Code
                                _TextLabel5.FontSize = 'Size14'
                                _TextLabel5.TextWrapped = true
                                _TextLabel5.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                                _TextLabel5.TextYAlignment = 'Top'
                                _TextLabel5.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                _TextLabel5.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
                                _TextLabel5.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(80, 245, 245)
                            end
                        end
                    elseif u276:FindFirstChild('NameEsp') then
                        u276:FindFirstChild('NameEsp'):Destroy()
                    end
                end)
            end
        end
        function UpdateChestEsp()
            local v279, v280, v281 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace'):GetChildren())

            while true do
                local u282

                v281, u282 = v279(v280, v281)

                if v281 == nil then
                    break
                end

                pcall(function()
                    if string.find(u282.Name, 'Chest') then
                        if ChestESP then
                            if string.find(u282.Name, 'Chest') then
                                if u282:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number) then
                                    if u282.Name == 'Chest1' then
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.Text = 'Silver Chest' .. ' \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u282.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(192, 192, 192)
                                    end
                                    if u282.Name == 'Chest2' then
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.Text = 'Gold Chest' .. ' \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u282.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 215, 0)
                                    end
                                    if u282.Name == 'Chest3' then
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.Text = 'Platinum Chest' .. ' \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u282.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                                        u282['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 170, 204)
                                    end

                                    u282.Handle['NameEsp' .. Number].TextLabel.Text = u282.Name .. '   \n' .. u266((game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Head.Position - u282.Handle.Position).Magnitude / 3) .. ' M'
                                else
                                    local _BillboardGui3 = Instance.new('BillboardGui', u282)

                                    _BillboardGui3.Name = 'NameEsp' .. Number
                                    _BillboardGui3.ExtentsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
                                    _BillboardGui3.Size = UDim2.new(1, 200, 1, 30)
                                    _BillboardGui3.Adornee = u282
                                    _BillboardGui3.AlwaysOnTop = true

                                    local _TextLabel6 = Instance.new('TextLabel', _BillboardGui3)

                                    _TextLabel6.Font = Enum.Font.Code
                                    _TextLabel6.FontSize = 'Size14'
                                    _TextLabel6.TextWrapped = true
                                    _TextLabel6.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
                                    _TextLabel6.TextYAlignment = 'Top'
                                    _TextLabel6.BackgroundTransparency = 1
                                    _TextLabel6.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
                                end
                            end
                        elseif u282:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number) then
                            u282:FindFirstChild('NameEsp' .. Number):Destroy()
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end

        Time = v98.Main:AddParagraph({
            Title = '',
            Content = '',
        })

        function UpdateTime()
            local _t2 = os.date('*t')
            local v316 = _t2.hour % 24
            local v317 = v316 < 12 and 'AM' or 'PM'
            local __02i02i02is2 = string.format('%02i:%02i:%02i %s', (v316 - 1) % 12 + 1, _t2.min, _t2.sec, v317)
            local __02d02d04d2 = string.format('%02d/%02d/%04d', _t2.day, _t2.month, _t2.year)
            local _LocalizationService2 = game:GetService('LocalizationService')
            local _LocalPlayer3 = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer
            local _ = _LocalPlayer3.Name
            local _, v322 = pcall(function()
                return _LocalizationService2:GetCountryRegionForPlayerAsync(_LocalPlayer3)
            end)

            Time:SetTitle(__02d02d04d2 .. ' - ' .. __02i02i02is2 .. ' [ ' .. v322 .. ' ]')
        end

        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    UpdateTime()
                end)
            end
        end)
        game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(function(p323)
            local v324 = math.floor(workspace.DistributedGameTime + 0.5)
            local v325 = math.floor(v324 / 3600) % 24
            local v326 = math.floor(v324 / 60) % 60
            local v327 = math.floor(v324 / 1) % 60

            Time:SetDesc('Hour : ' .. v325 .. '  |  Minute : ' .. v326 .. '  |  Second : ' .. v327 .. '\n[Ping] : ' .. game:GetService('Stats').Network.ServerStatsItem['Data Ping']:GetValueString(math.floor(2)) .. '   [FPS] : ' .. math.floor(2 / p323))
        end)

        v98.Main:AddButton({
            Title = 'Hop to Lower Player',
            Description = 'it will Teleport to Lower People on The Server',
            Callback = function()
                local v332 = game
                local _Workspace = v332.Workspace
                local _Lighting = v332.Lighting
                local _Terrain = _Workspace.Terrain

                _Terrain.WaterWaveSize = 0
                _Terrain.WaterWaveSpeed = 0
                _Terrain.WaterReflectance = 0
                _Terrain.WaterTransparency = 0
                _Lighting.GlobalShadows = false
                _Lighting.FogEnd = 9000000000
                _Lighting.Brightness = 0
                settings().Rendering.QualityLevel = 'Level01'

                local v336, v337, v338 = pairs(v332:GetDescendants())
                local v339 = true

                while true do
                    local v340

                    v338, v340 = v336(v337, v338)

                    if v338 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if v340:IsA('Part') or (v340:IsA('Union') or (v340:IsA('CornerWedgePart') or v340:IsA('TrussPart'))) then
                        v340.Material = 'Plastic'
                        v340.Reflectance = 0
                    elseif v340:IsA('Decal') or v340:IsA('Texture') and v339 then
                        v340.Transparency = 1
                    elseif v340:IsA('ParticleEmitter') or v340:IsA('Trail') then
                        v340.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0)
                    elseif v340:IsA('Explosion') then
                        v340.BlastPressure = 1
                        v340.BlastRadius = 1
                    elseif v340:IsA('Fire') or (v340:IsA('SpotLight') or (v340:IsA('Smoke') or v340:IsA('Sparkles'))) then
                        v340.Enabled = false
                    elseif v340:IsA('MeshPart') then
                        v340.Material = 'Plastic'
                        v340.Reflectance = 0
                        v340.TextureID = 1.0385902758728955e16
                    end
                end

                local v341, v342, v343 = pairs(_Lighting:GetChildren())

                while true do
                    local v344

                    v343, v344 = v341(v342, v343)

                    if v343 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if v344:IsA('BlurEffect') or (v344:IsA('SunRaysEffect') or (v344:IsA('ColorCorrectionEffect') or (v344:IsA('BloomEffect') or v344:IsA('DepthOfFieldEffect')))) then
                        v344.Enabled = false
                    end
                end
            end,
        })

        local function v353(p350)
            local v351 = tostring(p350)

            repeat
                local v352

                v351, v352 = v351:gsub('^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)', '%1,%2')
                k = v352
            until k == 0

            return v351
        end

        local v354 = {}

            if v355.OnSale == true then
                local v356 = v353(v355.Price)
                local v357 = v355.Name .. ' - $' .. v356

                table.insert(v354, v357)
            end
        end

        _OthersSetting:AddButton({
            Title = 'FPS Boost',
            Description = 'it will Remove all texture make your game less Lag',
            Callback = function()
                local v387 = game
                local _Workspace2 = v387.Workspace
                local _Lighting2 = v387.Lighting
                local _Terrain2 = _Workspace2.Terrain

                _Terrain2.WaterWaveSize = 0
                _Terrain2.WaterWaveSpeed = 0
                _Terrain2.WaterReflectance = 0
                _Terrain2.WaterTransparency = 0
                _Lighting2.GlobalShadows = false
                _Lighting2.FogEnd = 9000000000
                _Lighting2.Brightness = 0
                settings().Rendering.QualityLevel = 'Level01'

                local v391, v392, v393 = pairs(v387:GetDescendants())
                local v394 = true

                while true do
                    local v395

                    v393, v395 = v391(v392, v393)

                    if v393 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if v395:IsA('Part') or (v395:IsA('Union') or (v395:IsA('CornerWedgePart') or v395:IsA('TrussPart'))) then
                        v395.Material = 'Plastic'
                        v395.Reflectance = 0
                    elseif v395:IsA('Decal') or v395:IsA('Texture') and v394 then
                        v395.Transparency = 1
                    elseif v395:IsA('ParticleEmitter') or v395:IsA('Trail') then
                        v395.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0)
                    elseif v395:IsA('Explosion') then
                        v395.BlastPressure = 1
                        v395.BlastRadius = 1
                    elseif v395:IsA('Fire') or (v395:IsA('SpotLight') or (v395:IsA('Smoke') or v395:IsA('Sparkles'))) then
                        v395.Enabled = false
                    elseif v395:IsA('MeshPart') then
                        v395.Material = 'Plastic'
                        v395.Reflectance = 0
                        v395.TextureID = 1.0385902758728955e16
                    end
                end

                local v396, v397, v398 = pairs(_Lighting2:GetChildren())

                while true do
                    local v399

                    v398, v399 = v396(v397, v398)

                    if v398 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if v399:IsA('BlurEffect') or (v399:IsA('SunRaysEffect') or (v399:IsA('ColorCorrectionEffect') or (v399:IsA('BloomEffect') or v399:IsA('DepthOfFieldEffect')))) then
                        v399.Enabled = false
                    end
                end
            end,
        })

        function CheckNotifyComplete()
            local v409, v410, v411 = pairs(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:FindFirstChild('Notifications'):GetChildren())

            while true do
                local u412

                v411, u412 = v409(v410, v411)

                if v411 == nil then
                    break
                end
                if u412.Name == 'NotificationTemplate' and string.lower(u412.Text):find('quest completed') then
                    pcall(function()
                        u412:Destroy()
                    end)

                    return true
                end
            end

            return false
        end

        local u413 = false
        local u414 = false
        local u415 = Name
        local u416 = NameMon

        task.spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    if not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Select Monster'] and (not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level'] and (not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Fruit Mastery'] or _G.Settings.Main['Type Mastery'] ~= 'Quest')) and (not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Fruit Mastery'] or _G.Settings.Main['Type Mastery'] ~= 'No Quest') then
                    end
                    if _G.Settings.Config['Double Quest'] then
                        if u414 ~= true then
                            CheckQuest()

                            u415 = Name
                            u416 = NameMon

                            spawn(function()
                                pcall(function()
                                    if u413 == false and (CheckNotifyComplete() and _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level']) then
                                        u413 = true

                                        while wait(0.5) do
                                            u414 = true

                                            if CheckNotifyComplete() or _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level'] == false then
                                                break
                                            end
                                        end

                                        u414 = false
                                        u413 = false
                                    end
                                end)
                            end)
                        elseif LevelFarm and tonumber(LevelFarm - 1) ~= 0 then
                            CheckOldQuest(tonumber(LevelFarm - 1))
                        end
                    else
                        CheckQuest()
                    end
                    if _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Fruit Mastery'] then
                    end

                    GetQuestTitle = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title
                    GetQuest = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest

                    local _ = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value

                    if not string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, NameMon) then
                        game.ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild('Remotes').CommF_:InvokeServer('AbandonQuest')
                    end
                    if GetQuest.Visible == false then
                        StartMagnet = false
                        FastAttack = false
                        Questtween = u167(CFrameQuest.Position, CFrameQuest)

                        if World1 and (NameMon == 'Fishman Commando' or NameMon == 'Fishman Warrior') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                            if Questtween then
                                Questtween:Stop()
                            end

                            wait(0.5)
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875))
                        elseif World1 and (NameMon ~= 'Fishman Commando' and NameMon ~= 'Fishman Warrior') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                            if Questtween then
                                Questtween:Stop()
                            end

                            wait(0.5)
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(3864.8515625, 6.6796875, -1926.7841796875))
                        elseif World2 and string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                            if Questtween then
                                Questtween:Stop()
                            end

                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(923.21252441406, 126.9760055542, 32852.83203125))
                        elseif World2 and not string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                            if Questtween then
                                Questtween:Stop()
                            end

                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(-6508.5581054688, 89.034996032715, -132.83953857422))
                        elseif (CFrameQuest.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 250 then
                            if Questtween then
                                Questtween:Stop()
                            end

                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrameQuest

                            wait(1)

                            if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Humanoid').Health > 0 then
                                Com('F_', 'StartQuest', QuestName, LevelQuest)
                                Com('F_', 'SetSpawnPoint')
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if GetQuest.Visible ~= true then
                    end
                    if not string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, 'kissed') then
                    end

                    local v417, v418, v419 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                    while true do
                        repeat
                            repeat
                                while true do
                                    local v420

                                    v419, v420 = v417(v418, v419)

                                    if v419 == nil then
                                    end
                                    if string.find(v420.Name, 'kissed Warrior') then
                                        break
                                    end
                                    if string.find(v420.Name, 'kissed Warrior') == nil then
                                        StartMagnet = false
                                        FastAttack = false

                                        if not string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, NameMon) then
                                            Com('F_', 'AbandonQuest')
                                        end

                                        Modstween = u167(CFrameMon.Position, CFrameMon)

                                        if World1 and (NameMon == 'Fishman Commando' or NameMon == 'Fishman Warrior') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                                            if Modstween then
                                                Modstween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            wait(0.5)
                                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875))
                                        elseif World1 and (NameMon ~= 'Fishman Commando' and NameMon ~= 'Fishman Warrior') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                                            if Modstween then
                                                Modstween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            wait(0.5)
                                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(3864.8515625, 6.6796875, -1926.7841796875))
                                        elseif World2 and string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                                            if Modstween then
                                                Modstween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            wait(0.5)
                                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(923.21252441406, 126.9760055542, 32852.83203125))
                                        elseif World2 and not string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                                            if Modstween then
                                                Modstween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            wait(0.5)
                                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(-6508.5581054688, 89.034996032715, -132.83953857422))
                                        elseif (CFrameMon.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 250 then
                                            if Modstween then
                                                Modstween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrameMon
                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            until game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild(v420.Name)

                            if _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level'] and (v420.Name == v420.Name and (v420:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v420:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and v420.Humanoid.Health > 0))) then
                            end
                        until _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Select Monster'] and (v420.Name == v420.Name and (v420:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v420:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and v420.Humanoid.Health > 0)))

                        if string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, NameMon) then
                            break
                        end

                        Com('F_', 'AbandonQuest')
                    end

                    if true then
                        wait()

                        if World1 and (Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875) - v422.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude < 5000 then
                            if FarmtoTarget then
                                FarmtoTarget:Stop()
                            end

                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875))
                        elseif World1 and (v422.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                            if FarmtoTarget then
                                FarmtoTarget:Stop()
                            end

                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(3864.8515625, 6.6796875, -1926.7841796875))
                        elseif (v422.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150 then
                            if v422:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v422:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (v422.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150) or (Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875) - v422.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude < 5000 then
                                if FarmtoTarget then
                                    FarmtoTarget:Stop()
                                end

                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v422.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame

                                if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.PvpDisabled.Visible == true then
                                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('EnablePvp')
                                end
                                if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HasBuso') then
                                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('Buso')
                                end
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg') and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg').Level.Value >= 150 then
                                    game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(true, 'V', false, game)
                                    game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(false, 'V', false, game)
                                end
                                if AttackRandomType ~= 1 then
                                    if AttackRandomType ~= 2 then

                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875))
                            elseif World1 and (NameMon ~= 'Fishman Commando' and NameMon ~= 'Fishman Warrior') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(3864.8515625, 6.6796875, -1926.7841796875))
                            elseif World2 and string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(923.21252441406, 126.9760055542, 32852.83203125))
                            elseif World2 and not string.find(Name, 'Ship') and (CFrameQuest.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 30000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(-6508.5581054688, 89.034996032715, -132.83953857422))
                            elseif (CFrameMon.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 250 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrameMon
                            end
                        end
                    end

                    if game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild(v468.Name) and (_G.Settings.Main['Fast Farm Level'] and (v468.Name == v468.Name and (v468:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v468:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and v468.Humanoid.Health > 0)))) then
                    else
                    end
                    if string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, NameMon) then
                    end

                    Com('F_', 'AbandonQuest')
                    wait()

                    FarmtoTarget = u167(v469.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 30, 0))

                    if v469:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v469:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (v469.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 250) then
                        if FarmtoTarget then
                            FarmtoTarget:Stop()
                        end

                        AutoHaki()

                        if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild(_G.SelectWeapon) then
                            wait()
                            EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])
                        end

                        StartMagnet = true
                        FastAttack = true

                        if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                            game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 670), workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame)
                        end

                        v469.HumanoidRootPart.Transparency = 1
                        v469.Humanoid.JumpPower = 0
                        v469.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
                        v469.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false

                        v469.Humanoid:ChangeState(11)
                        v469.Humanoid:ChangeState(14)

                        PosMon = v469.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame

                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg') and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg').Level.Value >= 150 then
                            game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(true, 'V', false, game)
                            game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(false, 'V', false, game)
                        end

                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v469.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 30, 0)
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild(NameMon) and (_G.Settings.Main['Fast Farm Level'] and (string.find(GetQuestTitle.Text, NameMon) and (v469.Humanoid.Health > 0 and (v469.Parent and GetQuest.Visible ~= false)))) then
                    end

                    StartMagnet = false
                    FastAttack = false

                    local v469

                    v452, v469 = v450(v451, v452)

                    if v452 == nil then
                    end
                    if _G.Settings.Main['Fast Farm Level'] and (v469.Name == NameMon and (v469:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (v469:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and v469.Humanoid.Health > 0))) then
                    else
                    end
                end)
            end

                                                            FastAttack = false
                                                            StartMagnet = false

                                                        end
                                                    end
                                                end)
                                            end
                                        end
                                    else
                                        Questtween = u167(CFrame.new(1057.92761, 137.614319, 1242.08069).Position, CFrame.new(1057.92761, 137.614319, 1242.08069))

                                        if (CFrame.new(1057.92761, 137.614319, 1242.08069).Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 300 then
                                            if Bartilotween then
                                                Bartilotween:Stop()
                                            end

                                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(1057.92761, 137.614319, 1242.08069)
                                        end
                                    end
                                else
                                    Bartilotween = u167(CFrame.new(-456.28952, 73.0200958, 299.895966).Position, CFrame.new(-456.28952, 73.0200958, 299.895966))

                                    if (CFrame.new(-456.28952, 73.0200958, 299.895966).Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 300 then
                                        if Bartilotween then
                                            Bartilotween:Stop()
                                        end

                                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(-456.28952, 73.0200958, 299.895966)

                                    end
                                end
                            end

                                                Bartilotween:Stop()

                                end
                            end

                                    end

                                end
                            end

                            v509, v510, v503 = pairs(game.Workspace.Enemies:GetChildren())

                            if not game.Workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild('rip_indra') then

                                Com('F_', 'ZQuestProgress', 'Begin')
                            end

                            local v514

                            v513, v514 = v511(v512, v513)

                            if v513 == nil then
                            end
                            if v514.Name ~= 'rip_indra' or (not v514:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') or (not v514:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') or v514.Humanoid.Health <= 0)) then
                            else
                            end
                            if true then
                                wait()

                                if (v514.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 300 then
                                    if (v514.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 300 then
                                        if Farmtween then
                                            Farmtween:Stop()
                                        end

                                        FastAttack = true

                                        AutoHaki()
                                        EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])

                                        end

                                        v514.HumanoidRootPart.Transparency = 1
                                        v514.Humanoid.JumpPower = 0
                                        v514.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
                                        v514.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false

                                        u167(v514.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                                    end
                                else
                                    Farmtween = u167(v514.HumanoidRootPart.Position, v514.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame)
                                end
                            end
                            if _G.Settings.Main['Auto Third Sea'] and (v514.Parent and v514.Humanoid.Health > 0) then
                            else
                            end

                            wait(0.5)

                            Check = 2

                            repeat
                                wait()
                                Com('F_', 'TravelZou')
                            until Check == 1

                            FastAttack = false
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            _G.Settings.Main['Auto Third Sea'] = false

        function GetAllMeleeFarm()
            if u518 == false then
                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(unpack({
                    'BuySuperhuman',
                }))

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Superhuman', 400) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u518 = true
                end
            end

            wait(0.5)

            if u519 == false then
                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BuyElectricClaw')

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Electric Claw', 400) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u519 = true
                end
            end

            wait(0.5)

            if u520 == false then
                game.ReplicatedStorage.Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BuyDragonTalon')

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Dragon Talon', 400) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u520 = true
                end
            end

            wait(0.5)

            if u521 == false then
                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(unpack({
                    'BuySharkmanKarate',
                }))

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Sharkman Karate', 400) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u521 = true
                end
            end

            wait(0.5)

            if u522 == false then
                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(unpack({
                    'BuyDeathStep',
                }))

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Death Step', 400) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u522 = true
                end
            end
            if u523 == false then
                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(unpack({
                    'BuyGodhuman',
                }))

                if CheckMasteryWeapon('Godhuman', 350) == 'true UpTo' then
                    u523 = true
                end
            end
        end

                                }))

                        else

                        end
                    end
                    if v527.Parent and (v527.Humanoid.Health > 0 and _G.Settings.FightingStyle['Death Step'] ~= false) and not (game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Library Key') or game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Library Key')) then

                    end
