                    if _G.Settings.Main['Auto KatakuriV2'] and (v666.Humanoid.Health > 0 and v666.Parent) and not (game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice")) then
                    end

                    local v665, v666 = v673(v674, v665)

                    if v665 == nil then
                    end
                    if (v666.Name == 'Diablo' or (v666.Name == 'Deandre' or v666.Name == 'Urban')) and (v666:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (v666:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and v666.Humanoid.Health > 0)) then
                    else
                    end

                    StartMagnet = false
                    FastAttack = false

                    wait()
                    AutoHaki()
                    EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])

                    StartMagnet = true
                    FastAttack = true
                    StartMagnet = v668.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame

                    toTargetP(v668.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))

                    if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                    end
                    if _G.Settings.Main['Auto KatakuriV2'] and (not game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Prince') and (v668.Parent and v668.Humanoid.Health > 0)) then
                    else
                    end

                    FastAttack = false
                    StartMagnet = false

                    local v667, v668 = v671(v672, v667)

                    if v667 == nil then
                    end
                    if (v668.Name == 'Baking Staff' or (v668.Name == 'Head Baker' or (v668.Name == 'Cake Guard' or v668.Name == 'Cookie Crafter'))) and v668.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                    else
                    end

                    wait()
                    AutoHaki()
                    EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])

                    FastAttack = true
                    v670.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false

                    toTargetP(v670.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))

                    if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                    end
                    if _G.Settings.Main['Auto KatakuriV2'] and (v670.Parent and v670.Humanoid.Health > 0) then
                    end

                    local v669, v670 = v675(v676, v669)

                    if v669 == nil then
                    end
                    if v670.Name ~= 'Dough King' then
                    else
                    end
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") then
                        if string.find(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('SweetChaliceNpc'), 'Where') then
                            game.StarterGui:SetCore('SendNotification', {
                                Title = 'Notification',
                                Text = 'not enough material!',
                                Icon = '',
                                Duration = 3,
                            })
                        else
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('SweetChaliceNpc')
                        end
                    end
                    if not (game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Sweet Chalice') or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Sweet Chalice')) then
                    end
                    if string.find(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('CakePrinceSpawner'), 'Do you want to open the portal now?') then
                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('CakePrinceSpawner')
                    end
                    if not (game.Workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild('Baking Staff') or (game.Workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild('Head Baker') or (game.Workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cake Guard') or game.Workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cookie Crafter')))) then
                        FastAttack = false
                        StartMagnet = false

                        toTargetP(CFrame.new(-1820.0634765625, 210.74781799316406, -12297.49609375))
                    end

                    local v671, v672

                    v671, v672, v667 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                    if game.ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild('Dough King') or game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Dough King') then
                    end
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Red Key') or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Red Key') then
                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer(unpack({
                            'CakeScientist',
                            'Check',
                        }))
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Visible ~= true then
                        wait(0.5)
                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('EliteHunter')
                    end
                    if not (string.find(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Diablo') or (string.find(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Deandre') or string.find(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Urban'))) then
                    end
                    if not (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Diablo') or (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Deandre') or game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Urban'))) then
                        FastAttack = false

                        if game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Diablo') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Diablo').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Deandre') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Deandre').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Urban') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Urban').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        end
                    end

                    local v673, v674

                    v673, v674, v665 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                    if not game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Dough King') then
                        FastAttack = false

                        if game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Dough King') then
                            toTargetP(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Dough King').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        end

                        toTargetP(CFrame.new(-2009.2802734375, 4532.97216796875, -14937.3076171875))
                    end

                    local v675, v676

                    v675, v676, v669 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                    if game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cake Prince') then
                        local v677, v678, v679 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                        while true do
                            local v680

                            v679, v680 = v677(v678, v679)

                            if v679 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if v680.Name ~= 'Cake Prince' then
                                toTargetP(CFrame.new(-2009.2802734375, 4532.97216796875, -14937.3076171875))
                            elseif v680:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (v680:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and v680.Humanoid.Health > 0) then
                                wait()
                                AutoHaki()
                                EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])

                                FastAttack = true
                                v680.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
                                v680.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0

                                u167(v680.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))

                                if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                                    game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                                    game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                                end
                                if _G.Settings.Main['Auto KatakuriV1'] and (v680.Parent and v680.Humanoid.Health > 0) then
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Prince') then
                        toTargetP(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Prince').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                    end
                    if KillMob == 0 then
                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('CakePrinceSpawner', true)
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Workspace').Map.CakeLoaf.BigMirror.Other.Transparency ~= 1 then
                        if game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cake Prince') then
                            u167(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cake Prince').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Prince') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Prince').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        end
                    end
                    if not (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cookie Crafter') or (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Cake Guard') or (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Baking Staff') or game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Head Baker')))) then
                        StartMagnet = false
                        FastAttack = false

                        u167(CFrame.new(-1820.0634765625, 210.74781799316406, -12297.49609375))

                        if game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cookie Crafter') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cookie Crafter').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Guard') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Cake Guard').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Baking Staff') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Baking Staff').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Head Baker') then
                            u167(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Head Baker').HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 0))
                        end
                    end

                    local v681, v682

                    v681, v682, v663 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())
                end)
            end
        end)

                        v699.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0

                        end

                    wait()

                Content = '',

                pcall(function()

                        else
                            EliteSpawn:SetTitle('Elite NPC Status : Not Spawn!')

                end)
            end)

            spawn(function()
                while wait() do
                    pcall(function()
                        if not _G.Settings.Main['Auto Elite Hunter'] then
                            if _G.Settings.Main['Elite Hop'] and _G.Settings.Main['Auto Elite Hunter'] then
                                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") then
                                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("God's Chalice") and _G.Settings.Main['Elite Cup'] then
                                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(-12471.169921875, 374.94024658203, -7551.677734375))

                                        if Auto_Farm_Level then
                                            _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level'] = false
                                        end
                                    end
                                elseif game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('EliteHunter') == "I don't have anything for you right now. Come back later." then
                                    Hop()
                                end
                            end

                            return
                        end
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Visible ~= true then
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('EliteHunter')
                        end
                        if not (string.find(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Diablo') or (string.find(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Urban') or string.find(game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Quest.Container.QuestTitle.Title.Text, 'Deandre'))) then
                            game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('EliteHunter')
                        end

                        local v702, v703, v704 = pairs(game.ReplicatedStorage:GetChildren())

                        while true do
                            local v705

                            v704, v705 = v702(v703, v704)

                            if v704 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if string.find(v705.Name, 'Diablo') or (string.find(v705.Name, 'Urban') or string.find(v705.Name, 'Deandre')) then
                                if Auto_Farm_Level then
                                    _G.Settings.Main['Auto Farm Level'] = false
                                end

                                EliteHunter = u167(v705.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame)

                                if (v705.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150 then
                                    if EliteHunter then
                                        EliteHunter:Stop()
                                    end

                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v705.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                                end
                            end
                        end

                        local v706, v707, v708 = pairs(game.Workspace.Enemies:GetChildren())
                        local v709

                        v708, v709 = v706(v707, v708)

                        if v708 == nil then
                        end
                        if not (string.find(v709.Name, 'Diablo') or (string.find(v709.Name, 'Urban') or string.find(v709.Name, 'Deandre'))) or (not v709:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') or (not v709:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') or v709.Humanoid.Health <= 0)) then
                        end
                        if true then
                            wait()
                            AutoHaki()

                            if (v709.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150 then
                                if (v709.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150 then
                                    if Farmtween then
                                        Farmtween:Stop()
                                    end

                                    game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = v709.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 30, 1)

                                    if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                                    end

                                    FastAttack = true

                                    EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])
                                end
                            else
                                Farmtween = u167(v709.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame)
                            end
                        end
                        if _G.Settings.Main['Auto Elite Hunter'] and (v709.Parent and v709.Humanoid.Health > 0) then
                        else
                        end

                        FastAttack = false
                    end)
                end
            end)

            _G.Settings.Main['Elite Cup'] = false

        local _MaterialFarm = v98.ItemFunction:AddSection('[ Material Farm ]')

        _MaterialFarm:AddDropdown('MaterialSelector', {
            Title = 'Select Material to Farm',
            Values = v236,
            Multi = false,
            Default = _G.Settings.Material.Choose,
        })
        _Options.MaterialSelector:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Material.Choose = _Options.MaterialSelector.Value

            SaveSettings()
        end)
        _MaterialFarm:AddToggle('MaterialToggle', {
            Title = 'Enable Material to Get',
            Default = _G.Settings.Material.Enable,
        })
        _Options.MaterialToggle:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Material.Enable = _Options.MaterialToggle.Value

            if _Options.MaterialToggle.Value == false then
                wait()
                u167(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame)
                wait()
            end

            spawn(function()
                while wait() and _G.Settings.Material.Enable do
                    xpcall(function()
                        if _G.Settings.Material.Choose == '' then
                            return
                        end

                        u256(_G.Settings.Material.Choose)

                        if not u242(MaterialMob) then
                            FastAttack = false
                            Modstween = u167(CFrameMon)

                            if World1 and table.find(MaterialMob, 'Fishman Commando') and (CFrameMon.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(61163.8515625, 11.6796875, 1819.7841796875))
                            elseif World1 and not table.find(MaterialMob, 'Fishman Commando') and (CFrameMon.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 50000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(3864.8515625, 6.6796875, -1926.7841796875))
                            elseif World1 and table.find(MaterialMob, "God's Guard") and (CFrameMon.Position - game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('HumanoidRootPart').Position).magnitude > 3000 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                wait(0.5)
                                game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('requestEntrance', Vector3.new(-4607.8227539063, 872.54248046875, -1667.5568847656))
                            elseif (CFrameMon.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150 then
                                if Modstween then
                                    Modstween:Stop()
                                end

                                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrameMon
                            end
                        end

                        local v788, v789, v790 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())
                        local u791

                        v790, u791 = v788(v789, v790)

                        if v790 == nil then
                        end
                        if not _G.Settings.Material.Enable or (not table.find(MaterialMob, u791.Name) or (not u791:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') or (not u791:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') or u791.Humanoid.Health <= 0))) then
                        end

                        wait()

                        FarmtoTarget = u167(u791.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 1))

                        if u791:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and (u791:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (u791.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 150) then
                            if FarmtoTarget then
                                FarmtoTarget:Stop()
                            end

                            AutoHaki()

                            FastAttack = true

                            EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])
                            spawn(function()
                                local v792, v793, v794 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                                while true do
                                    local u795

                                    v794, u795 = v792(v793, v794)

                                    if v794 == nil then
                                        break
                                    end
                                    if u795.Name == u791.Name then
                                        spawn(function()
                                            if InMyNetWork(u795.HumanoidRootPart) then
                                                u795.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = u791.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame
                                                u795.Humanoid.JumpPower = 0
                                                u795.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0
                                                u795.Head.CanCollide = false

                                                if u795.Humanoid:FindFirstChild('Animator') then
                                                    u795.Humanoid.Animator:Destroy()
                                                end

                                                u795.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false

                                                u795.Humanoid:ChangeState(14)
                                                u795.Humanoid:ChangeState(11)
                                                sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, 'SimulationRadius', math.huge)
                                            end
                                        end)
                                    end
                                end
                            end)

                            if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                                game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                                game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                            end
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg') and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Black Leg').Level.Value >= 150 then
                                game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(true, 'V', false, game)
                                game:service('VirtualInputManager'):SendKeyEvent(false, 'V', false, game)
                            end

                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = u791.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, _G.Settings.Config['Distance Enemy'], 1)
                        end
                        if u242(MaterialMob) and (_G.Settings.Material.Enable and (u791.Humanoid.Health > 0 and u791.Parent)) then
                        else
                        end
                    end, function(p796)
                        print('Auto Farm Material Error : ' .. p796)
                    end)
                end
            end)
            SaveSettings()
        end)

                                        end

                                end

                                            end
                                        else
                                            _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-36026, 20, 14211)
                                        end
                                    else
                                        _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-29025, 10, 15781)
                                    end
                                else
                                    _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-26558, 20, 12568)
                                end
                            else
                                _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-24451, 20, 9582)
                            end
                        else
                            _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-21226, 20, 6895)
                        end
                    else
                        _G.LevelLautan = CFrame.new(-18458, 20, 4028)
                    end
                end
            end)

                                        if not (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Shark') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Terrorshark') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Piranha') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Fish Crew Member') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('FishBoat') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('PirateBrigade') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('PirateBasic') and (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('PirateGrandBrigade') and game.Workspace._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Frozen Dimension'))))))))) then
                                            toTargetP(game:GetService('Workspace').Boats:FindFirstChild(_G.Settings.Main['Select Boats']).VehicleSeat.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 1, 0))

                                            local v965, v966, v967 = pairs(workspace.Boats:FindFirstChild(_G.Settings.Main['Select Boats']):GetDescendants())

                                                local v968

                                                end
                                            end

                                        end
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        else
                            buyb = toTargetP(CFrame.new(-16228, 9, 480))

                            if (CFrame.new(-16228, 9, 480).Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 10 then
                                if buyb then
                                    buyb:Stop()
                                end

                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
            end

                Description = 'it will Buy Selected Chip & Have fruit in Hand | For Manual Dungeon only!',
                Callback = function()
                    if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Special Microchip') and (not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Special Microchip') and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Timer.Visible == false) then
                        local v1013, v1014, v1015 = pairs(u983)

                        while true do
                            local v1016

                            v1015, v1016 = v1013(v1014, v1015)

                            if v1015 == nil then
                                break
                            end

                            local v1017, v1018, v1019 = pairs(u982)

                            while true do
                                local v1020

                                v1019, v1020 = v1017(v1018, v1019)

                                if v1019 == nil then
                                    break
                                end
                                if v1016 == v1020 then
                                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild(v1020) then
                                        if true then
                                            u94:Notify({
                                                Title = 'Auto Raid',
                                                Content = 'Not Have Fruit in Hands/Inventory',
                                                Duration = 8,
                                            })
                                        end
                                    else
                                        Com('F_', 'LoadFruit', v1020)
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end

                        game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('RaidsNpc', 'Select', _G.Settings.Dungeon.Chip)
                    end
                end,
            })
            _ManualRaid:AddButton({
                Title = 'Next Island',
                Description = 'it will Teleport to Next Island | For Manual Dungeon only!',
                Callback = function()
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.Timer.Visible == true then
                        pcall(function()
                            if game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 5') then
                                game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 5').CFrame = CFrame.new(game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 5').CFrame.x, 60, game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 5').CFrame.z)

                                if (game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 5').Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 350 then

                                end
                            elseif game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 4') then

                            elseif game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 1') then
                                game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 1').CFrame = CFrame.new(game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 1').CFrame.x, 60, game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 1').CFrame.z)

                                if (game:GetService('Workspace')._WorldOrigin.Locations:FindFirstChild('Island 1').Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).magnitude <= 350 then

            local _LawRaid = v98.DungeonFunction:AddSection('[ Law Raid ]')

            _LawRaid:AddToggle('LawRaid', {
                Title = 'Auto Law Raid',
                Default = _G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Law Raid'],
            })
            _Options.LawRaid:OnChanged(function()
                _G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Law Raid'] = _Options.LawRaid.Value

                if _Options.LawRaid.Value == false then

            _LawRaid:AddButton({
                Title = 'Buy Law Chip',
                Description = 'it will Buy Law Chip | For Manual Dungeon only!',
                Callback = function()
                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BlackbeardReward', 'Microchip', '1')
                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BlackbeardReward', 'Microchip', '2')
                end,
            })
            spawn(function()
                while wait() do
                    if _G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Law Raid'] then
                        pcall(function()
                            if not (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Order') or game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Order')) then
                                if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Microchip') or game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Microchip') then
                                    fireclickdetector(game:GetService('Workspace').Map.CircleIsland.RaidSummon.Button.Main.ClickDetector)
                                else
                                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BlackbeardReward', 'Microchip', '1')
                                    game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('BlackbeardReward', 'Microchip', '2')
                                end
                            end
                            if not (game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Order') or game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Order')) then
                                return
                            end
                            if not game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Order') then
                                if game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Order') then
                                    FastAttack = false

                                    toTargetP(CFrame.new(-6217.2021484375, 28.047645568848, -5053.1357421875))
                                end
                            end

                            local v1022, v1023, v1024 = pairs(game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:GetChildren())

                            while true do
                                local v1025

                                v1024, v1025 = v1022(v1023, v1024)

                                if v1024 == nil then
                                end
                                if v1025.Name == 'Order' then
                                    game:GetService('RunService').Heartbeat:wait()
                                    EquipWeapon(_G.Settings.Config['Select Weapon'])
                                    toTargetP(v1025.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 50, 25))

                                    v1025.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
                                    v1025.HumanoidRootPart.Size = Vector3.new(120, 120, 120)

                                    if not _G.Settings.Config['Fast Attack'] then
                                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
                                        game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
                                    end

                                    FastAttack = true

                                    if v1025.Parent and (v1025.Humanoid.Health > 0 and _G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Law Raid'] ~= false) and game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild(v1025.Name) then
                                    end

                                    FastAttack = false
                                end
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
            end)
        else
            _G.Settings.Dungeon['Auto Law Raid'] = false

        local _Ability = v98.PlayerFunction:AddSection('[ Ability ]')

        _Ability:AddButton({
            Title = 'Superhuman Jump',
            Description = 'Get Tool make your jump higher when you equip the tool',
            Callback = function()
                if not game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Superjump Tool') then
                    local _Tool = Instance.new('Tool')

                    _Tool.RequiresHandle = false
                    _Tool.Name = 'Superjump Tool'
                    _Tool.Parent = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack

                    _Tool.Equipped:Connect(function()
                        game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.JumpPower = 150
                    end)
                    _Tool.Unequipped:Connect(function()
                        game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.JumpPower = 50
                    end)
                end
            end,
        })
        _Ability:AddButton({
            Title = 'Fly Tool',
            Description = 'Get Tool make your Flying when you equip the tool',
            Callback = function()
                if not game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Fly Tool') then
                    local _Tool2 = Instance.new('Tool')
                    local _LocalPlayer5 = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer

                    _Tool2.RequiresHandle = false
                    _Tool2.Name = 'Fly Tool'
                    _Tool2.Parent = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Backpack

                    _Tool2.Equipped:Connect(function()
                        for _ = 1, 5 do
                            spawn(function()
                                local _Heartbeat = game:GetService('RunService').Heartbeat

                                Speedup = true

                                local _Character = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                                local v1033

                                if _Character then
                                    v1033 = _Character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA('Humanoid')
                                else
                                    v1033 = _Character
                                end

                                while Speedup and (_Heartbeat:Wait() and (_Character and (v1033 and v1033.Parent))) do
                                    if v1033.MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0 then
                                        _Character:TranslateBy(v1033.MoveDirection)
                                    end
                                end
                            end)
                        end

                        if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid').RigType ~= Enum.HumanoidRigType.R6 then
                            local _UpperTorso = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.UpperTorso
                            local _BodyGyro = Instance.new('BodyGyro', _UpperTorso)

                            _BodyGyro.P = 90000
                            _BodyGyro.maxTorque = Vector3.new(9000000000, 9000000000, 9000000000)
                            _BodyGyro.cframe = _UpperTorso.CFrame

                            local _BodyVelocity4 = Instance.new('BodyVelocity', _UpperTorso)

                            _BodyVelocity4.velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0.1, 0)
                            _BodyVelocity4.maxForce = Vector3.new(9000000000, 9000000000, 9000000000)
                        else
                            local _Torso = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Torso
                            local _BodyGyro2 = Instance.new('BodyGyro', _Torso)

                            _BodyGyro2.P = 90000
                            _BodyGyro2.maxTorque = Vector3.new(9000000000, 9000000000, 9000000000)
                            _BodyGyro2.cframe = _Torso.CFrame

                            local _BodyVelocity5 = Instance.new('BodyVelocity', _Torso)

                            _BodyVelocity5.velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0.1, 0)
                            _BodyVelocity5.maxForce = Vector3.new(9000000000, 9000000000, 9000000000)
                        end

                        local _Character2 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character
                        local v1041 = _Character2:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid') or _Character2:FindFirstChildOfClass('AnimationController')
                        local v1042 = next
                        local v1043, v1044 = v1041:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()

                        while true do
                            local v1045

                            v1044, v1045 = v1042(v1043, v1044)

                            if v1044 == nil then
                                break
                            end

                            v1045:AdjustSpeed(0)
                        end

                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Climbing, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.FallingDown, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Flying, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Freefall, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Physics, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.PlatformStanding, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Ragdoll, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.RunningNoPhysics, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Seated, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.StrafingNoPhysics, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming, false)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming)

                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.PlatformStand = true

                        while game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health == 0 do
                            game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Wait()

                            if ctrl.l + ctrl.r ~= 0 or ctrl.f + ctrl.b ~= 0 then
                                speed = speed + 0.5 + speed / maxspeed

                                if speed > maxspeed then
                                    speed = maxspeed
                                end
                            elseif ctrl.l + ctrl.r == 0 and (ctrl.f + ctrl.b == 0 and speed ~= 0) then
                                speed = speed - 1

                                if speed < 0 then
                                    speed = 0
                                end
                            end
                            if ctrl.l + ctrl.r ~= 0 or ctrl.f + ctrl.b ~= 0 then
                                bv.velocity = (game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame.lookVector * (ctrl.f + ctrl.b) + (game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame * CFrame.new(ctrl.l + ctrl.r, (ctrl.f + ctrl.b) * 0.2, 0).p - game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame.p)) * speed
                                lastctrl = {
                                    f = ctrl.f,
                                    b = ctrl.b,
                                    l = ctrl.l,
                                    r = ctrl.r,
                                }
                            elseif ctrl.l + ctrl.r ~= 0 or (ctrl.f + ctrl.b ~= 0 or speed == 0) then
                                bv.velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                            else
                                bv.velocity = (game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame.lookVector * (lastctrl.f + lastctrl.b) + (game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame * CFrame.new(lastctrl.l + lastctrl.r, (lastctrl.f + lastctrl.b) * 0.2, 0).p - game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame.p)) * speed
                            end

                            bg.cframe = game.Workspace.CurrentCamera.CoordinateFrame * CFrame.Angles(-math.rad((ctrl.f + ctrl.b) * 50 * speed / maxspeed), 0, 0)
                        end
                    end)
                    _Tool2.Unequipped:Connect(function()
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Climbing, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.FallingDown, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Flying, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Freefall, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Landed, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Physics, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.PlatformStanding, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Ragdoll, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Running, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.RunningNoPhysics, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Seated, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.StrafingNoPhysics, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:SetStateEnabled(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Swimming, true)
                        _LocalPlayer5.Character.Humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.RunningNoPhysics)

                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.UpperTorso:FindFirstChild('BodyVelocity') then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.UpperTorso:FindFirstChild('BodyVelocity'):Destroy()
                        end
                        if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.UpperTorso:FindFirstChild('BodyGyro') then
                            game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.UpperTorso:FindFirstChild('BodyGyro'):Destroy()
                        end

                        Speedup = false
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.PlatformStand = false
                        game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Animate.Disabled = false
                    end)
                end
            end,
        })
        _Ability:AddToggle('InfAbi', {
            Title = 'Infinite Agility',
            Default = _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Ability'],
        })
        _Options.InfAbi:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Ability'] = _Options.InfAbi.Value

            SaveSettings()

            _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Soru'] = _Options.Soru.Value

            Title = 'Infinite Geppo',
            Default = _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo'],
        })
        _Options.Geppo:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo'] = _Options.Geppo.Value

            SaveSettings()
        end)
        _Ability:AddToggle('Dodge', {
            Title = 'No Cooldown Dodge',
            Default = _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD'],
        })
        _Options.Dodge:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD'] = _Options.Dodge.Value

            Title = 'Water Walk',
            Default = _G.Settings.Ability['Water Walk'],
        })
        _Options.Jesus:OnChanged(function()
            _G.Settings.Ability['Water Walk'] = _Options.Jesus.Value

            SaveSettings()
        end)
        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    if _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Soru'] and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') ~= nil then
                        local v1046 = next
                        local v1047, v1048 = getgc()

                        while true do
                            local v1049

                            v1048, v1049 = v1046(v1047, v1048)

                            if v1048 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Soru') and typeof(v1049) == 'function' and getfenv(v1049).script == game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Soru') then
                                local v1050 = next
                                local v1051, v1052 = getupvalues(v1049)

                                while true do
                                    local v1053

                                    v1052, v1053 = v1050(v1051, v1052)

                                    if v1052 == nil then
                                        break
                                    end
                                    if typeof(v1053) == 'table' then
                                        repeat
                                            wait(0.1)

                                            v1053.LastUse = 0
                                        until not _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Soru']
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
            if _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Soru'] and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Soru') then
                local v1054 = next
                local v1055, v1056 = getgc()

                while true do
                    local v1057

                    v1056, v1057 = v1054(v1055, v1056)

                    if v1056 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Soru') and typeof(v1057) == 'function' and getfenv(v1057).script == game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Soru') then
                        local v1058 = next
                        local v1059, v1060 = getupvalues(v1057)

                        while true do
                            local v1061

                            v1060, v1061 = v1058(v1059, v1060)

                            if v1060 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if typeof(v1061) == 'table' then
                                repeat
                                    wait(0.1)

                                    v1061.LastUse = 0
                                until not _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Soru']
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    if _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo'] and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') ~= nil then
                        local v1062 = next
                        local v1063, v1064 = getgc()

                        while true do
                            local v1065

                            v1064, v1065 = v1062(v1063, v1064)

                            if v1064 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Skyjump') and typeof(v1065) == 'function' and getfenv(v1065).script == game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Skyjump') then
                                local v1066 = next
                                local v1067, v1068 = getupvalues(v1065)

                                while true do
                                    local v1069

                                    v1068, v1069 = v1066(v1067, v1068)

                                    if v1068 == nil then
                                        break
                                    end
                                    if tostring(v1068) == '9' then
                                        local v1070 = v1068

                                        repeat
                                            wait(0.1)
                                            setupvalue(v1065, v1068, 0)
                                        until not _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo']

                                        v1068 = v1070
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
            if _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo'] and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Skyjump') then
                local v1071 = next
                local v1072, v1073 = getgc()

                while true do
                    local v1074

                    v1073, v1074 = v1071(v1072, v1073)

                    if v1073 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Skyjump') and typeof(v1074) == 'function' and getfenv(v1074).script == game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Skyjump') then
                        local v1075 = next
                        local v1076, v1077 = getupvalues(v1074)

                        while true do
                            local v1078

                            v1077, v1078 = v1075(v1076, v1077)

                            if v1077 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if tostring(v1077) == '9' then
                                local v1079 = v1077

                                repeat
                                    wait(0.1)
                                    setupvalue(v1074, v1077, 0)
                                until not _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Geppo']

                                v1077 = v1079
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    if _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD'] and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') ~= nil then
                        local v1080 = next
                        local v1081, v1082 = getgc()

                        while true do
                            local v1083

                            v1082, v1083 = v1080(v1081, v1082)

                            if v1082 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Dodge') and typeof(v1083) == 'function' and getfenv(v1083).script == game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Dodge') then
                                local v1084 = next
                                local v1085, v1086 = getupvalues(v1083)

                                while true do
                                    local v1087

                                    v1086, v1087 = v1084(v1085, v1086)

                                    if v1086 == nil then
                                        break
                                    end
                                    if tostring(v1087) == '0.4' then
                                        local v1088 = v1086

                                        repeat
                                            wait(0.1)
                                            setupvalue(v1083, v1086, 0)
                                        until not _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD']

                                        v1086 = v1088
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
        game.Players.LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
            if _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD'] and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Dodge') then
                local v1089 = next
                local v1090, v1091 = getgc()

                while true do
                    local v1092

                    v1091, v1092 = v1089(v1090, v1091)

                    if v1091 == nil then
                        break
                    end
                    if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Dodge') and typeof(v1092) == 'function' and getfenv(v1092).script == game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild('Dodge') then
                        local v1093 = next
                        local v1094, v1095 = getupvalues(v1092)

                        while true do
                            local v1096

                            v1095, v1096 = v1093(v1094, v1095)

                            if v1095 == nil then
                                break
                            end
                            if tostring(v1096) == '0.4' then
                                local v1097 = v1095

                                repeat
                                    wait(0.1)
                                    setupvalue(v1092, v1095, 0)
                                until not _G.Settings.Ability['Dodge No CD']

                                v1095 = v1097
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                pcall(function()
                    if _G.Settings.Ability['Inf Ability'] then
                        local v1098 = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').FX.Agility:Clone()

                        if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart:FindFirstChild('Agility') then
                            v1098.Parent = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart
                        end
                    elseif game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Agility then
                        game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Agility:Destroy()
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)

        if game.workspace:FindFirstChild('WaterWalk') then
            game.workspace:FindFirstChild('WaterWalk'):Destroy()
        end

        platform = Instance.new('Part')
        platform.Name = 'WaterWalk'
        platform.Size = Vector3.new(15, 0.5, 15)
        platform.Anchored = true
        platform.Material = 'Neon'
        platform.Parent = game.workspace

        spawn(function()
            while wait() do
                if _G.Settings.Ability['Water Walk'] then
                    platform.CanCollide = true
                    platform.Position = Vector3.new(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X, game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y * 0 - 5, game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z)
                else
                    platform.CanCollide = false
                    platform.Position = Vector3.new(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.X, game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Y * 0 - 6, game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Z)
                end
            end
        end)
        v95:IgnoreThemeSettings()
        v95:SetIgnoreIndexes({})
        v96:BuildInterfaceSection(v98.Settings)
        v95:BuildConfigSection(v98.Settings)
        v97:SelectTab(1)
        u94:Notify({
            Title = 'Thunder Z Hub',
            Content = 'The script has been loaded.',
            Duration = 8,
        })
        v95:LoadAutoloadConfig()
    end

    return
end
